description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with a cache on node_modules/ and a before_script that runs npm install. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm run test. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs npm run jsdoc, then npm run build, creates the directory .public/docs, copies the docs folder to .public/docs, copies the build folder to .public, renames the generated public directory to react_public, moves .public to public, publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
